description: Project scaffolding: FastAPI + Next.js + PostgreSQL with Docker Compose
steps: Initialize FastAPI project structure
Initialize Next.js app with TypeScript and Tailwind
Configure PostgreSQL with Docker Compose
Set up Alembic for migrations
Create health check endpoints
Verify full stack starts and connects

description: Authentication system with email/password and role-based access (Analyst, Reviewer, Admin)
steps: Create user table with role enum
Implement registration and login endpoints with JWT
Add role-based middleware
Build login/register UI pages
Test all three roles can authenticate

description: Charity master record CRUD with CRA registration number as natural key
steps: Create charity table with all CI fields (formal name, common name, CRA number, sector, fiscal year end, website, etc.)
Build REST API with full CRUD
Implement search/filter by name, sector, CRA number
Create charity list and detail UI pages
Import existing Name Reference data (1,001 records)

description: Sector and classification taxonomy management
steps: Create sector, sub-sector, and sector_group tables
Build admin UI for managing taxonomy
Implement sector assignment on charity records
Import existing sector mappings from JD Charities List

description: Contact management for charity liaisons
steps: Create contact table linked to charities
Store name, email, phone, role, notes
Build contact UI within charity detail page
Import existing contact data from Summer 2025 email column

description: Evaluation cycle management (create, configure, close seasonal batches)
steps: Create evaluation_cycle table with name, start/end dates, target count
Build admin UI for creating and managing cycles
Implement cycle status transitions (planning, active, review, closed)
Add cycle dashboard with summary statistics

description: Priority scoring engine combining web traffic, staleness, and donor demand
steps: Create priority_score table with component scores
Implement scoring algorithm: views weight + staleness weight + demand weight + Top 100 bonus
Build priority calculation batch job
Create priority queue UI sorted by composite score
Verify against existing Priority Sheet rankings

description: Analyst assignment with workload balancing
steps: Create evaluation_assignment table linking analyst, charity, cycle
Build assignment UI with drag-and-drop or bulk assign
Implement workload balancing view showing assignments per analyst
Support reassignment with audit trail

description: 12-stage evaluation workflow state machine
steps: Define stages enum: prioritized, assigned, financials_acquisition, federal_corp_check, cra_data_pull, financial_analysis, srss_scoring, impact_scoring, review, charity_outreach, charity_response, published
Create evaluation_stage_log table for audit trail
Implement state transition validation rules
Build Kanban board UI showing charities across stages
Add stage transition timestamps and duration tracking

description: Financial acquisition tracker with RFI escalation chain
steps: Create financial_acquisition table tracking: AFS online check, RFI sent date, 2nd RFI date, phone follow-up date, CRA request date, received date
Build acquisition status UI within evaluation detail
Implement escalation timer alerts (e.g., 14 days no response -> prompt 2nd RFI)
Generate RFI email templates via Resend integration
Track financial statement URLs per charity

description: CRA data request batch management
steps: Create cra_data_request table with charity, years requested, dates
Build batch request generation UI
Track request status (pending, received, not_available)
Import from existing CRA Request sheets

description: Institutional memory: evaluation notes with versioning across cycles
steps: Create evaluation_note table with cycle_id, charity_id, note_type, content, author, timestamp
Build notes timeline UI showing all notes across cycles
Support note types: general, financial, followup, difficulty
Import existing 2022-2025 Notes columns from Summer sheets
Full-text search across all notes

description: Financial data entry form matching CI's analysis structure
steps: Create financial_analysis table with all CI fields (donations, gov funding, revenue, program costs, admin costs, funding costs, reserves, etc.)
Build structured data entry form with field validation
Auto-calculate derived metrics (admin %, funding %, overhead %, PCC)
Support multi-year entry (3-year comparison)
Display financial summary card

description: Financial transparency scoring (1-3 scale with display flag configuration)
steps: Create transparency_config table with 30+ REPORT_Show* boolean flags
Build toggle UI for configuring which metrics to display per charity
Auto-derive transparency score from flag configuration
Store transparency level on charity record

description: Financial notes and adjustments editor (Ci adjustments tracking)
steps: Create financial_adjustment table recording each Ci adjustment
Build rich text editor for Financial Notes and Financial Review sections
Track adjustment types: deferred contributions, amortization, consolidation, reclassification
Display adjustments in structured format on charity profile

description: Star rating and impact rating calculation
steps: Implement star rating algorithm (1-5 stars based on financial metrics)
Implement impact rating as X,Y coordinate system
Build rating display component
Store ratings with version history
Validate against existing JD Charities List ratings

description: SRSS 26-question scoring framework with category rollups
steps: Create srss_framework table with 26 questions mapped to 6 categories
Build scoring form UI with guidance text per question
Auto-calculate category scores: Strategy %, Activities %, Outputs %, Outcomes %, Quality %, Learning %
Derive letter grade (A+, A, B+, B, C, D, F) from total score
Store SRSS scores with year dimension

description: SRSS historical time series and trend visualization
steps: Create srss_historical table storing scores by year (2013-present)
Build trend chart showing SRSS score over time per charity
Import existing SRSS year columns from Summer 2025 sheet
Display year-over-year change indicators (up/down arrows)

description: Results and Impact narrative editor
steps: Build rich text editor for ResultsAndImpact content
Support HTML content storage (matching existing CI format)
Preview rendering matching charityintelligence.ca profile style
Version history for narrative content

description: Two-stage authorization workflow (Analyst -> Reviewer -> Authorized)
steps: Implement BJ authorization step (financial review approval)
Implement GT authorization step (final sign-off)
Build review queue UI showing pending authorizations
Add comment/annotation support on specific sections
Track authorization timestamps and reviewer identity

description: Profile builder assembling all sections into publishable charity profile
steps: Create profile_content table with section types: mission, financial_review, financial_notes, charity_adds, results_impact
Build profile preview UI matching charityintelligence.ca layout
Auto-populate financial data sections from financial_analysis
Support diff view between current and previous published version
Generate profile URL slug

description: Charity outreach tracking (send profile, track response)
steps: Build email send UI with template selection
Integrate Resend for profile delivery to charity contacts
Track: sent date, email saved, read receipt, response received, call scheduled
Store charity response content (AndTheCharityAdds)
Import existing outreach status from Summer sheets

description: Public charity request form with fuzzy matching
steps: Build public-facing form: name, email, requested charity name
Implement fuzzy matching against existing charity database
Store request with matched/unmatched status
Send confirmation email to requester

description: Demand aggregation dashboard with vote counts and triage
steps: Aggregate requests into vote counts per charity
Build triage UI with disposition options: Done, To Do, Not a Charity, Too Small, Not in Canada
Link aggregated demand to priority scoring engine
Display demand signal on charity detail page

description: Import historical request data (13,294 requests from 2011-present)
steps: Parse and clean Request Listing sheet data
Fuzzy match requested charity names to existing records
Import Donor Requests aggregated votes
Import Charity Requests and Incoming Requests
Reconcile duplicate charities across request sources

description: Analyst throughput dashboard (replaces Stats 2025 sheet)
steps: Track per-analyst metrics across all workflow stages
Build dashboard with analyst comparison charts
Show cycle-over-cycle productivity trends
Display bottleneck identification (which stages have longest dwell time)

description: Cycle progress dashboard with completion tracking
steps: Show overall cycle progress: charities completed vs target
Display stage distribution histogram
Track average time per stage
Generate end-of-cycle summary report

description: Web traffic integration for priority scoring
steps: Build GA4 data import pipeline (views, active users, engagement time per charity page)
Map page titles to charity records via CID/slug
Store traffic snapshots for priority scoring
Display traffic trends on charity detail page

description: Harness API client for CRA T3010 data retrieval
steps: Define Harness API contract for T3010 data access
Build API client with authentication
Implement data pull for financial fields matching cur_financial schema
Auto-populate financial analysis form from T3010 data
Handle API errors gracefully with manual fallback

description: Harness API client for scraped charity website data
steps: Define API contract for scraped data (annual reports, financial statements URLs)
Build API client for charity website monitoring
Surface newly-detected financial statements in acquisition tracker
Flag charities where new AFS detected but not yet processed

description: Data export API for Harness platform consumption
steps: Build REST API exposing published charity evaluations
Include all profile sections, ratings, financial data, SRSS scores
Support incremental sync via updated_at filtering
Document API contract for Harness data pipeline ingestion
Implement API key authentication

description: Import Name Reference master data (1,001 charity records with 175 fields)
steps: Map all 175 columns to new schema tables
Handle data type conversions and null handling
Import charity identity, financial, rating, and content fields
Validate import against source counts
Generate import reconciliation report

description: Import JD Charities List (240 evaluated charities with detailed metrics)
steps: Map 94 columns to financial_analysis, srss, and rating tables
Import sector classifications and groupings
Import Q1-Q26 SRSS question responses
Validate star ratings and impact scores match

description: Import Summer 2025 work-in-progress state
steps: Map evaluation pipeline status to 12-stage state machine
Import analyst assignments and priority scores
Import all notes columns as evaluation_notes
Import outreach status (profile sent, response, etc.)
Reconstruct financial acquisition status from column data

description: Import Summer 2024 and Priority Reference historical data
steps: Import prior cycle data for trend analysis
Map Summer 2024 charities to canonical records
Import historical SRSS scores from year columns
Import Priority Reference priority calculations
